PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar May-20-2008 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Miller for the Administrator.

Mr. Miller stated that the claim lacked any merit, that the law suit filed was not served on the Administrator and that he wanted authority to appear on that matter so that he could file a Motion for Summary Judgment. The Court informed Mr. Miller that it preferred to have the Petition For Final Distribution filed and denied the Petition For Instructions.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Santiago.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-16-2006 Granted Per Written Order
